title: Correct misspelled task type labels
content: Ensure task type labels like 'classification' are spelled correctly to avoid mismatches.
avoid: Do not use misspelled labels like 'classificaiton'.

title: Keep FILTER expressions simple
content: Use FILTER only for expressions over bound variables. Avoid complex FILTER conditions that mix multiple predicates.
avoid: Do not write FILTER with multiple predicates or conditions.

title: Do not use relation-like tokens as objects
content: A PGMR triple must be subject relation object. Ensure that predicates are not used as objects in triples.

title: Bind parent nodes for nested fields
content: Always bind parent nodes before accessing nested fields. For example, use contribution -> NLP task -> input/output.
avoid: Do not skip parent nodes when querying nested fields.

title: Use correct predicate references
content: Ensure predicates like pgmr:implemented_approach are correctly referenced to avoid mismatches.
avoid: Do not use incorrect or misspelled predicate references.

title: Select appropriate placeholders
content: Use specific placeholders for fields like ?url or ?year based on the context of the query.
avoid: Do not use generic or incorrect placeholders that do not match the expected output.
